analysis.executive_summary: Audit crawled 3,305 pages from Contentful developer documentation with 100% crawl coverage. Detected 13 confirmed broken internal documentation links. API reference coverage is low at 36.9% across 457 detected API pages. Example code reliability estimate is 86.87% with 89.36% of pages showing last-updated metadata. Overall audit confidence is 80.39%, with link verification confidence at 67.22%.
strengths: Complete crawl coverage at 100% (3,305 of 3,312 in-scope pages)
High example code reliability estimate at 86.87%
Strong freshness metadata coverage at 89.36% of pages
Single-product topology provides clear documentation structure
risks: 13 confirmed broken internal documentation links degrading user navigation experience
API reference coverage critically low at 36.9%, indicating incomplete API documentation
5 unverified links due to authentication, rate-limiting, or server blocks create uncertainty
Link verification confidence at 67.22% suggests potential undetected link issues
SEO/geo issue rate at 6.89% may impact discoverability in search and regional access
Overall confidence at 80.39% indicates moderate audit limitations
457 API pages detected but only 36.9% have adequate usage documentation coverage

prioritized_actions.action: Fix all 13 confirmed broken internal documentation links
Expand API usage documentation to increase 36.9% reference coverage to minimum 70%
Investigate and resolve 5 unverified links (auth/rate-limit/server issues)
Address SEO/geo issues affecting 6.89% of pages to improve discoverability
Improve example code reliability from 86.87% to 95%+ through validation automation

limitations: External audit cannot verify links behind authentication walls or rate-limited endpoints (5 unverified URLs)
API coverage detection relies on pattern matching; actual API completeness requires internal schema validation
Example code reliability is estimated through static analysis; runtime execution success not guaranteed
Crawl trapped 7,054 URLs as duplicates/noise; some edge-case content may be excluded from analysis
67.22% link confidence indicates potential false negatives in broken link detection due to server-side blocks
